title: Movement Skills
effect: You are trained in climbing and jumping. Enabler. Moving Like Water (3 Speed points): You spin and move so that your defense and attacks are aided by your fluid motion. For one minute, all your attacks and Speed defense tasks gain an asset. Enabler.
details: You are trained in climbing and jumping. Enabler.
